Al-Anon Theme

Gratitude & Hope

Moving from despair toward appreciation for progress, even when circumstances haven’t changed.

“Hope is what gets us to the first meeting. Gratitude is what keeps us coming back.”

Gratitude is a muscle we build by looking for the light in the midst of the struggle. It shifts our focus from what is missing to the abundance that is already here.

Share Your Experience

How has looking for gratitude helped you find a sense of hope, even when things feel uncertain?

0/3000 characters

By submitting, you consent to sharing your experience with the Daily Paths community.

Apply Gratitude & Hope to your life, daily.

Our journaling tools are designed to help you process Gratitude & Hope in real-time. Use the Al-Anon Daily Paths app to track your insights and receive daily reminders for your recovery journey.
